zh.lifeSummary: 當Jewfrosinija Jaroslavna Rurik於大約1150年出生在烏克蘭Івано-ФранківськаГалицький районГалич時，她的父親Yaroslav Osmomysl16歲，母親Olga Euphrosyne Jurivna von Susdal40歲。她於大約1169年與Duke of Novgorod-Seversk Igor Yurij Svyatoslavich在烏克蘭Івано-ФранківськаГалицький район結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1176年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jewfrosinija Jaroslavna Rurik于大约1150年出生在乌克兰Івано-ФранківськаГалицький районГалич时，她的父亲Yaroslav Osmomysl16岁，母亲Olga Euphrosyne Jurivna von Susdal40岁。她于大约1169年与Duke of Novgorod-Seversk Igor Yurij Svyatoslavich在乌克兰Івано-ФранківськаГалицький район结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1176年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Rurik
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Slovak (mainly Jurík): from a pet form of the personal name Juraj, an equivalent of Latin Georgius (see George ).

variants.name: George
meanings: English, Welsh, French, and Romanian: from the personal name George, Latin Georgius, Greek Geōrgios, from an adjectival form, geōrgios ‘rustic’, of Greek geōrgos ‘farmer’. This became established as a personal name in classical times through its association with the fashion for pastoral poetry. Its popularity in western Europe increased at the time of the Crusades, which brought greater contact with the Orthodox Church, in which several Christian martyrs and saints of this name are venerated, in particular a saint believed to have been martyred at Nicomedia in AD 303, who, however, is at best a shadowy figure historically. Nevertheless, by the end of the Middle Ages Saint George had become associated with an unhistorical legend of dragon-slaying exploits, which caught the popular imagination throughout Europe, and he came to be considered the patron saint of England among other places. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages, e.g. German Georg , Assyrian/Chaldean Giwargis, Gewargis , or Georgis , and Albanian Gjergji , and also their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Greek Georgiadis , Georgopoulos , Hatzigeorgiou ‘George the Pilgrim’, and Papageorgiou , Romanian Georgescu or Gheorghescu, Serbian Djordjevic . The name George is also found among Christians in southern India (compare Geevarghese and Varghese ), but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US.
Native American (e.g. Navajo): adoption of the English personal name George (see 1 above) as a surname.

variants.name: Jurick
meanings: Germanized or Americanized form of Slovak Jurík (see Jurik ).
Americanized form of Croatian Jurić, Slovenian and Slovak Jurič (see Juric ). Compare Yurick .

en.lifeSummary: When Jewfrosinija Jaroslavna Rurik was born about 1150, in Halych, Halych, Ivano-Frankivsk, Ukraine, her father, Yaroslav Osmomysl, was 16 and her mother, Olga Euphrosyne Jurivna von Susdal, was 40. She married Duke of Novgorod-Seversk Igor Yurij Svyatoslavich about 1169, in Halych, Ivano-Frankivsk, Ukraine. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died after 1176.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jewfrosinija Jaroslavna Rurik est née environ 1150, à Halych, Halytsʹkyy Rayon, Ivano-Frankivsk, Ukraine, son père, Yaroslav Osmomysl, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Olga Euphrosyne Jurivna von Susdal, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Duke of Novgorod-Seversk Igor Yurij Svyatoslavich environ 1169, à Halytsʹkyy Rayon, Ivano-Frankivsk, Ukraine. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée après 1176.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jewfrosinija Jaroslavna Rurik um 1150 in Halych, Halytsʹkyy Rayon, Ivano-Frankivsk, Ukraine geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Yaroslav Osmomysl 16 und ihre Mutter Olga Euphrosyne Jurivna von Susdal 40. Sie hat um 1169 in Halytsʹkyy Rayon, Ivano-Frankivsk, Ukraine Duke of Novgorod-Seversk Igor Yurij Svyatoslavich geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1176.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jewfrosinija Jaroslavna Rurik è nata il circa 1150 nel Halych, Halytsʹkyy Rayon, Ivano-Frankivsk, Ucraina, sua padre, Yaroslav Osmomysl, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Olga Euphrosyne Jurivna von Susdal, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Duke of Novgorod-Seversk Igor Yurij Svyatoslavich circa 1169, nel Halytsʹkyy Rayon, Ivano-Frankivsk, Ucraina. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1176.

ja.lifeSummary: Jewfrosinija Jaroslavna Rurikが約1150年にウクライナІвано-ФранківськаГалицький районГаличで生まれた時，父Yaroslav Osmomyslは16歳，母Olga Euphrosyne Jurivna von Susdalは40歳であった。約1169年にウクライナІвано-ФранківськаГалицький районでDuke of Novgorod-Seversk Igor Yurij Svyatoslavichと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1176年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jewfrosinija Jaroslavna Rurik(이)가 대략 1150년 우크라이나 Івано-Франківська Галицький район Галич에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Yaroslav Osmomysl(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Olga Euphrosyne Jurivna von Susdal(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 대략 1169년 우크라이나 Івано-Франківська Галицький район에서 Duke of Novgorod-Seversk Igor Yurij Svyatoslavich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1176년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jewfrosinija Jaroslavna Rurik nasceu aproximadamente 1150, em Halych, Halytsʹkyy Rayon, Ivano-Frankivsk, Ucrânia, seu pai, Yaroslav Osmomysl, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Olga Euphrosyne Jurivna von Susdal, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Duke of Novgorod-Seversk Igor Yurij Svyatoslavich aproximadamente 1169, em Halytsʹkyy Rayon, Ivano-Frankivsk, Ucrânia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1176.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jewfrosinija Jaroslavna Rurik родилась около 1150 г. в местности Галич, Галицкий район, Ивано-Франковская, Украина, её отцу по имени Yaroslav Osmomysl было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Olga Euphrosyne Jurivna von Susdal, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Duke of Novgorod-Seversk Igor Yurij Svyatoslavich около 1169 г. в местности Галицкий район, Ивано-Франковская, Украина. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла после 1176 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jewfrosinija Jaroslavna Rurik nació aproximadamente 1150, en Halych, Halytsʹkyy Rayon, Ivano-Frankivsk, Ucrania, su papá, Yaroslav Osmomysl, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Olga Euphrosyne Jurivna von Susdal, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Duke of Novgorod-Seversk Igor Yurij Svyatoslavich aproximadamente 1169, en Halytsʹkyy Rayon, Ivano-Frankivsk, Ucrania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de 1176.
